Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: cane, underarm holster, revolver, pocket watch
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Described putting on a white shirt, black trousers, underarm holster with a revolver, formal suit, halved top hat, and carrying a cane and pocket watch.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: formal suit, white shirt, black trousers, halved top hat

Frye.face_description: high nose bridge, very thin lips
Frye.visual_anchor: Extremely pale male with a cold bearing, wearing a long black Victorian trench coat and a black silk cravat.
Frye.color_palette: ashen grey, deep black, cold white
Frye.distinguishing_features: faint smell of rotting corpses, cold and dark demeanor
Frye.accessories: Tin-colored square flask containing tobacco, disinfectant, and mint
Frye.source_notes: Text describes his 'pale hand that did not seem to belong to a member of the living' and his black trench coat.
Frye.era_clothing_lock: long black wool trench coat, high-collared white shirt, black silk cravat, dark wool trousers
Frye.unique_identifier: extremely pale skin like a corpse with a cold and dark bearing

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text confirms his official rank as a high-ranking inspector and his use of gloves during the investigation.

Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with the romantic vibe of a poet
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, green eyes, untucked white shirt with a black vest draped casually, poetic but unrestrained demeanor
Leonard Mitchell.distinguishing_features: high spiritual perceptivity; magnetic and deep voice; recites poetry in a serene and melancholic manner
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Explicitly described as black-haired and green-eyed, wearing a feather hat, a shirt, and a vest.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic
Old Neil.accessories: silver chain with a moonstone worn around the left wrist, gold pocket watch
Old Neil.role: civilian clerk in armory, former formal Nighthawk member
Old Neil.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions his 'black classic robe' and his eyes turning pitch-black during his drawing ritual.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Katy Stefania Bieber.face_description: Sharp facial features with deep-set eyes and thin, pursed lips characteristic of an elderly widow.
Katy Stefania Bieber.visual_anchor: Late 50s woman with grey hair in a bun, wearing a high-collared black Victorian mourning dress and a heavy wool shawl.
Katy Stefania Bieber.color_palette: charcoal black, dusty grey, pale ivory
Katy Stefania Bieber.distinguishing_features: Highly decomposed corpse; widow of a gem artisan
Katy Stefania Bieber.source_notes: Confirmed age and status as a widow from the police report; her deceased state is the focal point of the chapter's investigation.
Katy Stefania Bieber.unique_identifier: found as a decomposed corpse in a rocking chair; widow of a gem artisan
Katy Stefania Bieber.era_clothing_lock: high-collared black Victorian mourning dress, dark wool shawl, black leather button-up boots

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Explicitly described as brown-haired and wearing a casual cream-colored dress.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Awoken at the end of the Second Epoch. Her full title includes Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Text details her awakening and full titles.
